purpose: DebugTunnel recipe-selection QA cases for known-good Web Mini-App Lego families.

cases.goal: Build an Asteroids arcade mini-app with a vector triangle ship, rotation, thrust inertia, bullets, asteroid splitting, lives, score, and persistent best score.
Build an Asteroids-inspired game where the camera follows the ship through vast outer space with no wraparound, moons, turrets, enemy locations, and a home base.
Build a Word Quest word puzzle mini-app with letters, guesses, a letter grid, keyboard input, score, and streaks.
Build a Mastermind code breaker game with color guessing, feedback pegs, turns, score, and a compact HUD.
Build a Pong mini-app with paddles, ball physics, score, sound, and polished HUD.
Build a Minesweeper 99 mini-app with a grid of mines, flags, reveal logic, flood reveal, score, and timer.
Build a Texas Holdem poker mini-app with deck, cards, dealer, flop, turn, river, betting, and hand evaluator.
Build a Candy Match match-3 game with tile swapping, cascades, score, combos, and a colorful candy grid.
Build a Tower Defense mini-app with enemy waves, path followers, turrets, projectiles, lives, and score.
Build an Alien Abduction top-down arcade mini-app with alien ship movement, beams, projectiles, score, and waves.
Build a Blackjack card game with deck, hands, dealer logic, hit, stand, score, and betting chips.
Build a Frogger style game where I cross the road, dodge cars, ride logs, use grid movement, and track lives.
Build a Mario style plumber side-scrolling platformer with jumping, platforms, enemies, coins, and camera follow.
Build a PacMan style maze game with ghosts, pellets, powerups, grid movement, score, and lives.
Build a Checkers board game with an 8x8 board, captures, king me, legal moves, turns, and a mono visual style.
Build a Piano mini-app with playable keyboard notes, synth audio, and visual key feedback.
Build a Pyramid Hopper platformer mini-app with jumping, platforms, hazards, score, and camera follow.
Build a playable Chess board game with an 8x8 board, king, queen, bishop, rook, knight, legal moves, and turn manager.
Yes, build it now. Output the COMPLETE mini-app in a ```miniapp JSON block with no placeholders.
